parents.subject: LU-18014 tests: Add conf-sanity 43a interop check

commit.subject: LU-16738 tests: fix conf-sanity/161 repeat
commit.message:
LU-16738 tests: fix conf-sanity/161 repeat

Fix conf-sanity test_161 to allow running multiple iterations.
Minor code style cleanups while at it.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=conf-sanity env=ONLY=161,ONLY_REPEAT=10
Fixes: b850dbb71d ("LU-16738 utils: add mgsname mount option for custom hostname display")
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ie6b2ad0a3dd8b1099b85aaabbe8369c570500c1e
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/61428
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Reviewed-by: Chakshu Kansal <ckansal@ddn.com>
